channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
IT WORKS!!
Lots of tweaking with AI but soldiers are starting to move around naturally now, really ...
item.description:
IT WORKS!!
Lots of tweaking with AI but soldiers are starting to move around naturally now, really cool :O
First load is a bit heavy cause it rigs 128 players, not sure how to fix that, the GLB is only 5mb though https://t.co/8FXuRnrb2U
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 29
item.author: @levelsio

item.title:
Ok I kinda got animated soldiers now to work
On the server I used Blender to compile the FBX animat...
item.description:
Ok I kinda got animated soldiers now to work
On the server I used Blender to compile the FBX animations into one GLB that has the soldier model and all its animations like walking and running etc
It's still bit buggy but the dying animations look great
The running feels like it keeps resetting the animation instead of looping it, dunno why
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 9 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 1636
item.author: @levelsio

item.title: I'm European, it feels good to fight back and hold the line
